title: Skyblock Beyond Void Generation
description: This pack is meant tp provide the void world, for which the datapack Skyblock Beyond was developed
body:
This pack is meant to be played together with Skyblock Beyond.

It will generate a void Overworld, Nether, and End Dimension

Only a few structures remain with this datapack:

- A single Oak Tree upon World Generation

- Ocean Monuments

- Strongholds

- Nether Fortresses
